name: Fluidic Computer Opto-Isolated Telemetry and Energy Combiner Board

circuit_bill_of_materials.name: Precision Metal Film Pull-Up Resistors
circuit_bill_of_materials.specification: 10k Ohm, 1/4W, 0.1% Tolerance, Low Temperature Coefficient, SMT 0805
circuit_bill_of_materials.purpose: Tethers the collector pins of the ARFC-03 phototransistors to the 3.3V VCC rail, establishing a fast, reliable logic voltage transition when fluid cuts the IR beam

circuit_bill_of_materials.name: High-Speed Optocoupler Isolation ICs
circuit_bill_of_materials.specification: HCPL-4504, Dual-Channel, 1 Mbps Propagation Speed, SOT-8 SMD Package
circuit_bill_of_materials.purpose: Creates an absolute physical 2,500V RMS dielectric light barrier between the sensor pins and upstream microcontrollers, preventing EMP surge tracking

circuit_bill_of_materials.name: Ceramic Noise Decoupling Capacitors
circuit_bill_of_materials.purpose: Placed in parallel across the pull-up logic lines to filter out micro-static ripples generated by high-velocity gas friction inside the tracks

circuit_bill_of_materials.name: Ultra-Low Leakage Energy Harvesting Diodes
circuit_bill_of_materials.purpose: Directs the 5.2 mW Seebeck thermal and PVDF acoustic currents into the local charge tank while blocking reverse battery discharge
